Also, let me reconsider the game. The player can only move between two positions (rows 13-16 and 19-22). The horizontal path extends from the player. The targets are at rows 25-28, 31-34, 37-40.
Maybe the game is about:
1. Moving the player to the correct position
2. Using LEFT/RIGHT to adjust the path length
3. Using ACTION7 to "submit" or "activate" the connection
Or maybe the game is about clicking on the bottom bar items to change the path color, then moving the player to align with the matching target.
Let me try ACTION7 to see what it does.
